rule.name: Potential Netcat Reverse Shell Execution
rule.description: Detects execution of netcat with the "-e" flag followed by common shells. This could be a sign of a potential reverse shell setup.
rule.query:
{
  "selection_nc": {
    "Image|endswith": [
      "/nc",
      "/ncat"
    ]
  },
  "selection_flags": {
    "CommandLine|contains": [
      " -c ",
      " -e "
    ]
  },
  "selection_shell": {
    "CommandLine|contains": [
      " ash",
      " bash",
      " bsh",
      " csh",
      " ksh",
      " pdksh",
      " sh",
      " tcsh",
      "/bin/ash",
      "/bin/bash",
      "/bin/bsh",
      "/bin/csh",
      "/bin/ksh",
      "/bin/pdksh",
      "/bin/sh",
      "/bin/tcsh",
      "/bin/zsh",
      "$IFSash",
      "$IFSbash",
      "$IFSbsh",
      "$IFScsh",
      "$IFSksh",
      "$IFSpdksh",
      "$IFSsh",
      "$IFStcsh",
      "$IFSzsh"
    ]
  },
  "condition": "all of selection_*"
}
